meta.title: Lankawa — Sri Lanka Civic Intelligence
meta.description: Everything public, for every Sri Lankan. Unified civic data across economy, districts, disasters, and public services.
meta.districtDescription: {name} district in {province} province. Population {population}. Civic data on Lankawa.
meta.provinceDescription: {name} province — {count} districts with aggregated population, area, and election summaries.
meta.electionPresidentialDescription: 2024 presidential election first-preference results for {name} district.
meta.electionParliamentaryDescription: 2024 parliamentary election seat allocation for {name} electoral district.

vanni.title: Vanni electoral crosswalk
vanni.body: Sri Lanka uses separate administrative and electoral district boundaries. Four Northern administrative districts — Kilinochchi, Mannar, Mullaitivu, and Vavuniya — are aggregated into a single Vanni electoral district for parliamentary elections and some presidential reporting.
vanni.districtNote: Presidential results shown here reflect the combined Vanni electoral district tally published by the Election Commission, not an independent count for this administrative district alone.

flood.historySubtitle: Recent water-level readings for mapped river stations in this district.

disaster.title: Disaster & Flood
disaster.subtitle: River station monitoring aggregated on Lankawa.

services.title: Public Services
services.subtitle: Hospitals, schools, and GN division offices by district.

about.title: Mission & data sources
about.subtitle: Open civic intelligence for Sri Lanka — aggregated from public sources with provenance on every metric.
about.missionBody: Lankawa unifies public civic data — economy, disasters, districts, and more — into one accessible platform. We believe Sri Lankans should not need to visit dozens of separate websites to understand their country.
about.freshnessBody: Live metrics show a freshness tier based on when the source was last successfully fetched:
about.freshnessFresh: Fresh — fetched within the expected cadence
about.freshnessStale: Stale — older than expected but still available
about.disclaimerBody: Lankawa aggregates data from public and partner APIs. It is not an official government publication. Always verify critical information with primary sources.
about.apiBody: All data is available via a versioned JSON API with OpenAPI documentation.
about.platformBody: All data, documentation, and source attribution live on Lankawa. You never need to leave this platform to explore metrics, understand methodology, or use the public API.

sources.title: Data Sources
sources.subtitle: Every metric on Lankawa traces back to a registered source with freshness and methodology.

developers.title: Developer API
developers.subtitle: Public read-only endpoints for civic data, freshness, and district profiles — all served from Lankawa.
developers.overviewBody: All endpoints are same-origin JSON APIs. No API key is required for read access. Responses include freshness tiers and internal provenance paths.
developers.healthDescription: Freshness tiers and last-checked timestamps for every registered data source.
developers.pulseDescription: Current exchange rates, fuel prices, flood station counts, and related metrics.
developers.districtsDescription: All 25 Sri Lankan districts with population, area, and province metadata.
developers.districtDescription: Single district profile keyed by slug.
developers.openApiDescription: Machine-readable OpenAPI 3.1 document for the public API.
developers.provenanceBody: Every metric references a source ID and an internal provenance path. Use the sources registry to understand methodology and freshness.
developers.openApiBody: View the full OpenAPI specification rendered inside Lankawa, or fetch the raw JSON from the API.
developers.openApiViewerSubtitle: Machine-readable specification for the Lankawa public API.
developers.electionsDescription: National summary and district-level first-preference results with provenance paths.
developers.provincesDescription: All 9 Sri Lankan provinces with slug and trilingual names.
developers.provinceDescription: Single province profile with aggregated population, area, and district list.
developers.parliamentaryDescription: National seat summary and all electoral district results.
developers.parliamentaryDistrictDescription: Seat allocation for a single electoral district (e.g. colombo, vanni).
developers.servicesDescription: Filter hospitals, schools, and GN offices by district, type, or search query.
developers.serviceDescription: Single public service facility by ID.
developers.floodHistoryDescription: Historical water levels for a river monitoring station with freshness tier.
developers.fuelHistoryDescription: CPC petrol 92 and auto diesel price series from the Octane partner API.
developers.budgetDescription: FY 2024/25 and 2025/26 revenue, expenditure, and sector allocations (seed).
developers.dengueDescription: District-level dengue case counts from the Epidemiology Unit seed dataset.
developers.propertyDescription: District-level median land price bands with low/high ranges.
developers.electionHistoryDescription: Multi-cycle presidential summaries and parliamentary seat history.
developers.localGovernmentDescription: Filter MC, UC, and PS bodies by district, type, or search query.

budget.title: National Budget Tracker
budget.subtitle: Revenue, expenditure, and sector allocations — consumer-friendly breakdown of Sri Lanka's national budget.
budget.disclaimer: Seed data aligned with published budget speech totals. Not an official appropriation ledger.

health.title: Health Pulse
health.subtitle: Weekly dengue surveillance by district — representative epidemiological patterns.
health.districtTableSubtitle: Sorted by case count. Click a district for its full profile.
health.disclaimer: Seed data patterned on Epidemiology Unit weekly reports. Not live surveillance — verify with official health sources for clinical decisions.

compare.title: District Compare
compare.subtitle: Side-by-side comparison of population, elections, flood monitoring, services, and health metrics.
compare.empty: Select districts to compare using the picker above.

civic.title: MP Scorecards
civic.subtitle: Sample parliamentary attendance and legislative activity — inspired by civic accountability platforms.
civic.disclaimer: Illustrative seed data only. Not scraped from Manthri.lk or official Hansard records.

tenders.title: Government Tenders
tenders.subtitle: Sample procurement notices with district and status filters.
tenders.disclaimer: Static seed notices modeled on e-GP formats. Not live procurement data.

property.title: Property & Housing Pulse
property.subtitle: District-level median land price bands — representative housing market intelligence across Sri Lanka.
property.mapSubtitle: Districts colored by median land price per perch.
property.disclaimer: Representative seed data aligned with PropertyLK patterns. Not a property valuation service — verify with licensed professionals.

electionHistory.title: Election History Explorer
electionHistory.subtitle: Presidential cycles from 2010 to 2024 with district and provincial swing comparisons.
electionHistory.swingSubtitle: Change in winning candidate first-preference share between consecutive cycles.
electionHistory.parliamentarySubtitle: National seat summaries where parliamentary elections were held.
electionHistory.disclaimer: Historical district figures are seeded approximations aligned with published national totals — not digitized official district ledgers.

localGovernment.title: Local Government Directory

localGovernment.disclaimer: Representative seed directory — not an exhaustive official gazette list.
